Hi, welcome to my site!

I'm Apurva from Houston, TX. I studied information science at the University of Michigan. I'm a cloud engineer at Amazon Web Services working on enterprise VPC architecture, WAF, Route 53, and network infrastructure.

Before AWS, I interned at Becht Engineering building analytics dashboards for refining and oilfield clients. At Michigan I led a team that took an IoT medication platform from napkin sketch to $15K in funding.

I just love building stuff, whether that's cloud infrastructure tooling, ML models, or multi-agent systems. I read too much about wine and watch too much F1. Michigan football runs through my blood.

Most days you'll find me skiing, golfing, or finding something new to add to Beli. There's so much I want to understand and countless problems worth solving. Thanks for stopping by and have fun exploring!

Website

Built with Astro. Hosted on AWS (S3 + CloudFront). Source on GitHub. Typeset in Fraunces, Source Sans 3 & Crimson Pro.

Crafted by Apurva for -0.03 years
